reviews.review_title: made for VR! Please add more!
reviews.review_description: I really like BARC. The cats are purrrrfect! Soc cute. The levels are a lot of fun and the endless mode is peak. It's the first game i got this year and I loved every second. I hope you all make more content in the next update! or more modes like job simulator or i am cat. I know it's hard cause the other games don't do it too, please make a multiplayer version! After going through a few of the levels I really want multiplayer. Imagine sabotaging your friends or teaming up and getting better loot. a multiplayer mode would be perfect. Getting back into the game again with others would be amazing, doing jobs together, throwing stuff everywhere, and having fun would be a W

BARC adds such a fun twist to supermarket scanning and leans into this mechanic in really creative ways I've never seen, from the menu to gameplay. The level design and visuals are also so cool, and I loved all the surprises!!!! Can't wait for future content and updates!!!!!
Everything feels simple but satisfying, and the cats add so much charm. It’s easy to jump into and hard to put down, especially once you unlock more content. Vibes are immaculate.

developer_response.body: We appreciate the cat appreciation. More to come in the next updates

reviews.review_description: its the perfect yet chaotic game where theres so many things going on at once yet its so fun to play, 100% recommend
